requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / MEPS — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Cameroon energy programme)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效/最低能效标准——家用制冷器具（喀麦隆能效计划）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效/最低能效標準——家用製冷器具（喀麥隆能效計畫）

summary.en: Cameroon, as part of broader Central African (CEMAC) and ECCAS energy-efficiency efforts and national programmes promoted by the Ministry of Water Resources and Energy, has been moving toward minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and energy labelling for high-consumption household appliances, including refrigerators. Where a national energy-efficiency programme or ANOR energy standard applies, refrigerators may need to meet a minimum energy-efficiency threshold and carry an energy-information label, with measurement typically referencing the IEC 62552 series (characteristics and test methods for household refrigerating appliances). Unlike the EU, Cameroon does not operate a centralised pre-market product registry (no EPREL equivalent). Exporters should confirm with ANOR and the Ministry of Water Resources and Energy whether a MEPS threshold and/or energy label is currently mandatory for the target refrigerator category and capacity.
summary.zh: 作为中部非洲（CEMAC）及中非国家经济共同体（ECCAS）能效工作以及水利与能源部推动的国家计划的一部分，喀麦隆一直在推进对高耗电家用器具（包括电冰箱）实施最低能效标准（MEPS）和能效标识。当国家能效计划或ANOR能效标准适用时，电冰箱可能须达到最低能效门槛并附贴能效信息标签，测量通常参照IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具的特性与试验方法）。与欧盟不同，喀麦隆未设立集中式上市前产品注册库（无EPREL等同物）。出口商应与ANOR及水利与能源部确认目标电冰箱类别和容量当前是否强制适用MEPS门槛和/或能效标识。
summary.zht: 作為中部非洲（CEMAC）及中非國家經濟共同體（ECCAS）能效工作以及水利與能源部推動的國家計畫的一部分，喀麥隆一直在推進對高耗電家用器具（包括電冰箱）實施最低能效標準（MEPS）和能效標識。當國家能效計畫或ANOR能效標準適用時，電冰箱可能須達到最低能效門檻並附貼能效資訊標籤，測量通常參照IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具的特性與試驗方法）。與歐盟不同，喀麥隆未設立集中式上市前產品註冊庫（無EPREL等同物）。出口商應與ANOR及水利與能源部確認目標電冰箱類別和容量當前是否強制適用MEPS門檻和/或能效標識。

standards_or_laws: ANOR energy-efficiency standards (Normes Camerounaises, NC) where adopted for refrigerating appliances
Ministry of Water Resources and Energy (MINEE) — national energy-efficiency programmes / MEPS initiatives
IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (international measurement basis)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which sets energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient through the minimum threshold grade) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits. It is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label (CEL) administered under the NDRC/SAMR energy-labelling system. The Chinese grade framework and test methodology differ from any IEC 62552-based threshold a Cameroon MEPS programme might apply, so a Chinese energy grade does not automatically establish Cameroon compliance.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定了能效等级（1级最高效至最低门槛等级）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识（CEL）在NDRC/SAMR能效标识制度下管理。中国等级框架及试验方法与喀麦隆MEPS计划可能采用的基于IEC 62552的门槛不同，故中国能效等级不自动构成喀麦隆合规。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定了能效等級（1級最高效至最低門檻等級）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識（CEL）在NDRC/SAMR能效標識制度下管理。中國等級框架及試驗方法與喀麥隆MEPS計畫可能採用的基於IEC 62552的門檻不同，故中國能效等級不自動構成喀麥隆合規。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: The energy gap is conditional and depends on whether a Cameroon MEPS/energy-label requirement is in force for the target category at time of export: (1) Where a MEPS applies, the refrigerator must meet the Cameroon/ANOR threshold measured per the applicable IEC 62552 basis — a Chinese GB 12021.2 grade does not automatically satisfy it and may require recalculation or re-test; (2) Where an energy label is required, it must follow the Cameroon/ANOR label format and be presented in French — the Chinese CEL cannot serve as the Cameroon label; (3) Unlike the EU, there is no central pre-market registry (no EPREL), so no online database filing is needed, but the energy declaration becomes part of the PECAE conformity dossier. Exporters must confirm current applicability with ANOR / MINEE rather than assume a MEPS is or is not in force.
gap.zh: 能效差距属条件性，取决于出口时目标类别是否实施喀麦隆MEPS/能效标识要求：（1）若适用MEPS，电冰箱须按适用的IEC 62552基准测量并达到喀麦隆/ANOR门槛——中国GB 12021.2等级不自动满足，可能需重新计算或重新检测；（2）若须能效标识，须遵循喀麦隆/ANOR标识格式并以法语呈现——中国CEL不能充当喀麦隆标识；（3）与欧盟不同，喀麦隆无集中式上市前注册库（无EPREL），故无须在线数据库申报，但能效声明纳入PECAE合格评定档案。出口商须向ANOR/MINEE确认当前适用性，不应臆断MEPS是否已实施。
gap.zht: 能效差距屬條件性，取決於出口時目標類別是否實施喀麥隆MEPS/能效標識要求：（1）若適用MEPS，電冰箱須按適用的IEC 62552基準測量並達到喀麥隆/ANOR門檻——中國GB 12021.2等級不自動滿足，可能需重新計算或重新檢測；（2）若須能效標識，須遵循喀麥隆/ANOR標識格式並以法語呈現——中國CEL不能充當喀麥隆標識；（3）與歐盟不同，喀麥隆無集中式上市前註冊庫（無EPREL），故無須線上數據庫申報，但能效聲明納入PECAE合格評定檔案。出口商須向ANOR/MINEE確認當前適用性，不應臆斷MEPS是否已實施。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — MEPS and/or energy labelling apply where Cameroon (ANOR / MINEE) has adopted a national energy-efficiency requirement for the refrigerator category; confirm current applicability per category and capacity. No central pre-market registry (no EPREL equivalent)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 energy-efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite, Cameroun) / Ministere de l Eau et de l Energie (MINEE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cameroon energy-efficiency obligations for refrigerators are conditional on an in-force MEPS/energy-label programme under ANOR / MINEE. Where applicable, the threshold is measured on an IEC 62552 basis and the label must be in French — a Chinese GB 12021.2 grade and CEL label do not automatically satisfy it. There is no EPREL-style pre-market registry; the energy declaration is folded into the PECAE conformity dossier. Confirm current applicability with ANOR / MINEE.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆电冰箱能效义务以ANOR/MINEE现行的MEPS/能效标识计划为条件。适用时，门槛按IEC 62552基准测量，标识须以法语呈现——中国GB 12021.2等级及CEL标识不自动满足。无EPREL式上市前注册库；能效声明纳入PECAE合格评定档案。请向ANOR/MINEE确认当前适用性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆電冰箱能效義務以ANOR/MINEE現行的MEPS/能效標識計畫為條件。適用時，門檻按IEC 62552基準測量，標識須以法語呈現——中國GB 12021.2等級及CEL標識不自動滿足。無EPREL式上市前註冊庫；能效聲明納入PECAE合格評定檔案。請向ANOR/MINEE確認當前適用性。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Information Label — French-Language Presentation and Point-of-Sale Display (Cameroon)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效信息标识——法语呈现及销售点展示（喀麦隆）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效資訊標識——法語呈現及銷售點展示（喀麥隆）

summary.en: Where Cameroon requires an energy-information label for refrigerating appliances, the label and accompanying consumer information must be presented in French (Cameroon is officially bilingual French/English, with French dominant in commercial documentation). The label communicates the energy class or annual consumption to consumers at point of sale and accompanies the appliance documentation. The format follows the Cameroon/ANOR national specification rather than the EU A-to-G rescaled label. Because Cameroon does not maintain a centralised pre-market product registry (no EPREL), the obligation is to physically present a compliant label and to include the energy declaration in the conformity dossier reviewed under PECAE, not to file in an online database. Importers and dealers should ensure the label is affixed or available at the point of sale.
summary.zh: 当喀麦隆对制冷器具要求能效信息标识时，标识及随附的消费者信息须以法语呈现（喀麦隆官方为法语/英语双语，商业文件以法语为主）。该标识在销售点向消费者传达能效等级或年耗电量，并随附器具文件。格式遵循喀麦隆/ANOR国家规范，而非欧盟A至G重订评级标签。由于喀麦隆未维护集中式上市前产品注册库（无EPREL），其义务是实物展示合规标识并将能效声明纳入PECAE审核的合格评定档案，而非在线数据库申报。进口商和经销商应确保标识在销售点已加贴或可获取。
summary.zht: 當喀麥隆對製冷器具要求能效資訊標識時，標識及隨附的消費者資訊須以法語呈現（喀麥隆官方為法語/英語雙語，商業文件以法語為主）。該標識在銷售點向消費者傳達能效等級或年耗電量，並隨附器具文件。格式遵循喀麥隆/ANOR國家規範，而非歐盟A至G重訂評級標籤。由於喀麥隆未維護集中式上市前產品註冊庫（無EPREL），其義務是實物展示合規標識並將能效聲明納入PECAE審核的合格評定檔案，而非線上數據庫申報。進口商和經銷商應確保標識在銷售點已加貼或可獲取。

standards_or_laws: ANOR energy-label specification (Normes Camerounaises, NC) where adopted for refrigerating appliances
Cameroon consumer-information / labelling requirements — French-language presentation (Cameroon officially bilingual; French dominant in commerce)

summary.en: China's energy labelling for refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR). The CEL displays a numeric grade scale and annual energy consumption in Chinese, administered with the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS). Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is no pre-registration database analogous to EU EPREL. The CEL is presented in Chinese for the domestic market and does not meet a French-language presentation requirement for Cameroon.
summary.zh: 中国电冰箱能效标识为《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR）下的中国能效标识（CEL），以中文展示数字等级及年耗电量，由中国标准化研究院（CNIS）协同管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明等级；无类似欧盟EPREL的预注册数据库。CEL面向国内市场以中文呈现，不满足喀麦隆的法语呈现要求。
summary.zht: 中國電冰箱能效標識為《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR）下的中國能效標識（CEL），以中文展示數字等級及年耗電量，由中國標準化研究院（CNIS）協同管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明等級；無類似歐盟EPREL的預註冊數據庫。CEL面向國內市場以中文呈現，不滿足喀麥隆的法語呈現要求。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2 — underlying grade standard for the China Energy Label

gap.en: The main label gaps for Cameroon are language and format, not a registry: (1) Language — any required energy/consumer label and instructions must be in French; the Chinese-language CEL cannot be reused; (2) Format — the label must follow the Cameroon/ANOR national specification, not the EU A-to-G or Chinese numeric-grade format; (3) No online filing — unlike the EU, there is no EPREL-style database, so the obligation is physical label presentation plus inclusion of the energy declaration in the PECAE conformity dossier. Whether an energy label is mandatory at all depends on the in-force ANOR / MINEE programme for the category (see frigcm-energy-001) — confirm before producing labels.
gap.zh: 喀麦隆的标识主要差距在于语言和格式，而非注册库：（1）语言——任何要求的能效/消费者标识及说明书须以法语呈现；中文CEL不能复用；（2）格式——标识须遵循喀麦隆/ANOR国家规范，而非欧盟A至G或中国数字等级格式；（3）无在线申报——与欧盟不同，喀麦隆无EPREL式数据库，故义务为实物标识展示加将能效声明纳入PECAE合格评定档案。能效标识是否强制取决于该类别现行的ANOR/MINEE计划（见frigcm-energy-001）——制作标识前请确认。
gap.zht: 喀麥隆的標識主要差距在於語言和格式，而非註冊庫：（1）語言——任何要求的能效/消費者標識及說明書須以法語呈現；中文CEL不能複用；（2）格式——標識須遵循喀麥隆/ANOR國家規範，而非歐盟A至G或中國數字等級格式；（3）無線上申報——與歐盟不同，喀麥隆無EPREL式數據庫，故義務為實物標識展示加將能效聲明納入PECAE合格評定檔案。能效標識是否強制取決於該類別現行的ANOR/MINEE計畫（見frigcm-energy-001）——製作標識前請確認。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — where an energy label is required by ANOR / MINEE for the category, it must be in French and follow the Cameroon national format; no EPREL-style online registry; energy declaration forms part of the PECAE conformity dossier
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2 and presented in Chinese

source.publisher: ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite, Cameroun)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Any Cameroon energy/consumer label for refrigerators must be in French and follow the national ANOR format, not the Chinese CEL. There is no EPREL-style pre-market registry; the energy declaration is presented physically and within the PECAE conformity dossier. Whether the label is mandatory depends on the in-force ANOR / MINEE programme — confirm before printing labels.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆电冰箱的任何能效/消费者标识须以法语呈现并遵循ANOR国家格式，而非中国CEL。无EPREL式上市前注册库；能效声明以实物方式并在PECAE合格评定档案内呈现。标识是否强制取决于现行的ANOR/MINEE计划——印制标识前请确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆電冰箱的任何能效/消費者標識須以法語呈現並遵循ANOR國家格式，而非中國CEL。無EPREL式上市前註冊庫；能效聲明以實物方式並在PECAE合格評定檔案內呈現。標識是否強制取決於現行的ANOR/MINEE計畫——印製標識前請確認。
